legal_description.value: Lot 38, SEVILLE PARCEL 3, according to the plat of record in the office of the County Recorder of Maricopa County, Arizona, recorded in Book 554 of Maps, Page 19

exemption_code.value: B3 — Transfer between individual and wholly-owned entity; not exempt from recordation but subject to reduced disclosure per department guidance

source_note.value: Demo-only synthesized Affidavit of Property Value (A.R.S. § 11-1133) accompanying the LLC conveyance (20220200003) on Delgado parcel 999-03-411. Required in Arizona on every deed unless an exemption applies; the nominal $10 consideration triggers scrutiny but is accepted for individual-to-wholly-owned-LLC transfers. Not present in publicapi.recorder.maricopa.gov.
